@red/first-kindler.name: The First Kindler

typed_abilities.text: Deal 150. All your cards gain +40 HP for the game.

typed_abilities.name: Eternal Flame
typed_abilities.text: Deal 240. If this card would be KO'd next turn, it survives with 1 HP instead.

@red/blood-accord.title: Covenant that binds every red card that ever was

abilities.text: All your cards gain Resistance to the opponent's highest-DMG type.

abilities.name: Invoke the Accord
abilities.text: Deal 200. Heal every one of your cards to full.

typed_abilities.name: Seal the Pact
typed_abilities.text: All your cards gain Resistance to the opponent's highest-DMG type.

typed_abilities.name: Invoke the Accord
typed_abilities.text: Deal 200. Heal every one of your cards to full.

@red/red-binder-prime.name: Red Binder, Prime
@red/red-binder-prime.title: The binder given flesh

abilities.name: Summon the Collection
abilities.text: Deal 120. Put 3 random Red Binder cards from deck into play.

abilities.name: Binder's Judgment
abilities.text: Deal 300. If opponent has any card with 'Red' in its name, deal 150 more.

abilities.name: Close the Binder
abilities.text: All cards in play return to their owners' decks. You win ties on 'first to draw'.

typed_abilities.name: Summon the Collection
typed_abilities.text: Deal 120. Put 3 random Red Binder cards from deck into play.

typed_abilities.name: Binder's Judgment
typed_abilities.text: Deal 300. If opponent has any card with 'Red' in its name, deal 150 more.

typed_abilities.name: Close the Binder
typed_abilities.text: All cards in play return to their owners' decks. You win ties on 'first to draw'.

@red/red-binder-prime.flavor_text: The binder that binds the binders. Red from spine to spine.
